items.title: StatQuest with Josh Starmer · YouTube监控
items.titleOriginal: How AI works in Super Simple Terms!!!
items.titleZh: 人工智能如何用超级简单的术语运作！！！
items.summary:
在这个 StatQuest 中，我们解释了像 ChatGPT 这样的 AI 是如何工作的。然而，我们不会使用大量复杂的数学，而是使用一个超级简单的例子和​​超级简单的术语。如果数学让您感到害怕，那么这个 StatQuest 就适合您！即使数学并没有吓到您，这个 StatQuest 也会让您更深入地了解幕后发生的事情。嘭！

如果您想支持 StatQuest，请考虑...
Patreon：https://www.patreon.com/statquest
...或者...
YouTube 会员：https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCtYLUTtgS3k1Fg4y5tAhLbw/join

...从 StatQuest 商店购买一本书、一本学习指南、一件 T 恤或连帽衫或一首歌曲...
https://statquest.org/statquest-store/

...或者只是捐赠给 StatQu...
items.summaryOriginal:
In this StatQuest we explain how AI, like ChatGPT, works. However, instead of using lots of complicated math, we're going to use a super simple example and super simple terms. If math scares you, this StatQuest is for you! And even if math doesn't scare you, this StatQuest will give you a deeper understanding of what goes on under the hood. BAM!

If you'd like to support StatQuest, please consider...
Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/statquest
...or...
YouTube Membership: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCtYLUTtgS3k1Fg4y5tAhLbw/join

...buying a book, a study guide, a t-shirt or hoodie, or a song from the StatQuest store...
https://statquest.org/statquest-store/

...or just donating to StatQu...
